title: Record: 10L Int5-MLP3x BigramHash4096 SlidingEval — mean val_bpb 1.1489
body:
## Record Submission

**Mean val_bpb: 1.1489 ± 0.0003 (3 seeds)**

10-layer transformer, MLP 3× with Int5 quantization, BigramHash(4096/128), full-run Int6 QAT, sliding window eval (stride 64). Schedule optimized via Optuna TPE sweep.

| Seed | Roundtrip BPB | Steps |
|------|--------------|-------|
| 1337 | 1.1486 | 5,596 |
| 42 | 1.1492 | 5,567 |
| 7 | 1.1488 | 5,593 |

All under 16MB cap. 8×H100 SXM, 600s training. See README.md for full details.
